name: GTA V

seo.title: Can I Run GTA 5
seo.description: Check GTA 5 system requirements and see if your PC can run GTA V smoothly.

intro: Check if your PC can run GTA V smoothly.

faqs.question: Can GTA V run on 4GB RAM?
faqs.answer: It may launch but performance will be very poor with frequent stutters. 8GB is the minimum for a playable experience.

faqs.question: Does GTA V support 60 FPS on a mid-range PC?
faqs.answer: Yes, a GTX 1060 or RX 580 with an i7 CPU can sustain 60 FPS on high settings.

name: Cyberpunk 2077

seo.title: Can I Run Cyberpunk 2077
seo.description: Check Cyberpunk 2077 system requirements and test your PC for smooth performance.

intro: Test your PC for Cyberpunk 2077 performance in Night City.

faqs.question: Can Cyberpunk 2077 run without an SSD?
faqs.answer: An SSD is strongly recommended. Running from an HDD will cause long loading times and texture pop-in issues.

faqs.question: Does Cyberpunk 2077 support ray tracing on mid-range GPUs?
faqs.answer: Ray tracing requires at least an RTX 2060. Mid-range non-RTX cards should disable ray tracing for better performance.

name: Red Dead Redemption 2

intro: Find out if your PC can handle the vast open world of RDR2.

faqs.question: How much storage does RDR2 need?
faqs.answer: RDR2 requires approximately 150 GB of free storage space.

faqs.question: Can RDR2 run on 8GB RAM?
faqs.answer: Yes, but 16GB is recommended for a smoother experience especially in dense areas.

faqs.answer: Vanilla Minecraft can technically run on 2GB RAM but the experience will be poor. 4GB is the practical minimum.

faqs.answer: Yes, shader packs significantly increase GPU demand. A GTX 1060 or better is recommended for shaders at 60 FPS.
